structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.hover.g: Press [G] in mid-air to Ground Slam
structure.vampires.hunter_church.hover.r: Roll up to 3 times in succession
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.sw: Click [Middle-Mouse] to switch items between hands!
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.su:
§3§lSummoner Scrolls §0allow you to summon a plethora of powerful allies at the cost of §2Experience§0!

Use them to distract and divide hordes of enemies, or to team up against single targets!
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.he:
§4§lHeart Crystals§4 §0are the coalesced life essence of creatures. You can absorb it yourself to §8§obecome stronger§0.

§4Heart Crystals§0 can be found in two types. §cTemporary§0 and §6Permanent§0.

§cTemporary Heart Crystals§0 will §odisperse

§oafter death§0.

§6Permanent Heart Crystals §0will §ostay with you§0 for as long as you are one with this world.
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.em:
§2§lEmeralds§0 are often known for their use as a currency dating back to ancient times. 
Due to their magical potency, a §3Spectral Servant§0 is also willing to take them as payment in §8§oreturn for scavenging your wares after you perish§0.
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.li:
§9§lLimitite§0 is an ancient gemstone that is used to expand one's mind, §8§oallowing you to carry extra items§0 alongside you.







§8§n§oCRAFTING ->

When crafted with §1Lapis Lazuli§0, it can be turned into a §3Diamond§0!

When crafted with a §2Bottle O Enchanting§0, it can be turned into an §2Emerald§0!

When crafted with a §dSpell Scroll§0, it can §5duplicate§0 that spell!
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.an:
You can use the §5§lArcane Anvil §0to imbue useful spell scrolls to weapons!

Instead of consuming the spell, they will consume §3§omana§0 instead.
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.sc:
§3Scrapping & Repairing

§0You can §3§lscrap§r metal tools and armour into §3Scrap Metal§r, and Diamond tools and armour into Diamond Shards!

§0§lScrapping§r is done by throwing the item you want to §3scrap§r into an empty crafting grid,

like the one in your inventory.

§lRepairing§r is done by §2CRAFTING§r the item you want to repair with the corresponding §3scrap material.

Diamond§0 §3Shards§0 can repair not only Diamond items, but metal ones too.

In addition to scrap materials, you can also use §2Emeralds§0, §9Limitite§0, §4Temporary Heart Crystals§0 and §5Permanent Heart Crystals§0 to repair items too, with the latter §6fully repairing§0 any applicable item.
Four §oScrap Metal§0 can be crafted together to make one §oIron Ingot!
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.up:
§l3 §7§lIron Ingots§0 surrounding one §8§lStone§0 item in a crafting grid can §4§lupgrade§0 that item into its §7§lIron§0 counterpart.

Likewise, §l3 §3§lDiamonds§0 around §l1 §7§lIron§0 item can §4§lupgrade§0 it to §3§lDiamond.
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.ab:
§l- §nGround Pound§0

Use your Ground Pound to §8§oprevent fall damage§0 from great heights, §oknock §4§ovicious§0§o enemies back,§0 and §3§oecholocate§0§o the position of humans§0.

§8§oThis is an important ability! Make use out of it!

- §n§lDash

§0Combine your dash with your flight to §omove great distances with little effort§0!

Use this to §5§osmash§0 through trees and walls while flying!

- §n§lFlight Cancel

§0Pressing [SHIFT] while in flight will close your wings and stop flying in mid-air.

§8§oGood if you want to give your wings a rest!
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.in: Look around the Crypt for more info on how to play!
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.wa:
Wall cling with [Shift]

Release to jump
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.ov:
Enter the Overworld

Pillage. Destroy. Feed.
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.gr:
Press [G] to Ground Slam and find food sources. 

Very useful for spotting hidden enemies mid-combat, or protecting yourself from incoming damage.
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.pl:
Place your Chest down and grab your weapons.

You will be given new weapons, armour and spells with each new life.

Hold [Shift] and [Left Click] + drag your mouse across items to quickly grab them.
structure.vampires.vampire_crypt.book.gl:
Press [Spacebar] mid-air to glide.

Sneak with [Shift] mid-air to stop gliding. This is useful for conserving durability.

Dash whilst gliding with [CTRL] for a speed boost!
structure.vampires.hunter_church.book.ro:
Press [Control] to roll!

Roll up to 3 times in succession
quest.vampires.bosses_detected.title: Electrocutioner
quest.vampires.bosses_detected.descripti: That mage... I need to end him if I'm to find the locations of the Guardians.
quest.vampires.chest_particles.title: Repeatable Chest
quest.vampires.give_citadel_location.des: The Mantlediver... With this tool, I can drill deep into the Earth to find the location of the Citadel. My final challenge will await me there...
quest.vampires.give_ender_eye.title: Theos Soul
quest.vampires.give_revenant_ashes.title: Burning Ashes
quest.vampires.give_revenant_ashes.descr: Defeat the Ignited Revenant and claim its Burning Ashes.
quest.vampires.h01_hunter_introduction.d:
"This land is falling into darkness... I can feel it. Although the supernatural have been pushed back to the caves, mankind have only taken their place in their monstrosity."

"The Empire's cruelty knows no bounds... And even with it, they fail to see the threat growing beneath their feet."

"A §4§oVampire§r is on the loose. They were supposed to be extinct..."

"I have to stop it, no matter the cost. It matters not if these people would treat §oit§r and §oI§r the same: I WILL save them."

"I can cut off this infection from the source... I must find the §4§oAbyssal Lord§r. I'm certain one of the acclaimed Mages of the Illager Clan would know where to find them."

"I don't want to, but with their vendetta against me... §oIt looks like I'll have to find out the hard way§r."
quest.vampires.marker_electrocutioner_sc: With the Electrocutioner slain, the path to the Acropolis will be clear...
quest.vampires.marker_illusioner_maledic: With the Illusioner slain, the path to the Frosted Prison will be clear...
With the Pyreillager slain, the path to the Dragon Tower will be clear...
You awaken in a coffin, buried in a crypt deep underground. 

Time has taken its toll; You have no memory of how you got here or who you even are... 
Only that you are a foul distortion of nature - A §o§l§4Vampire§r. 

Though there is nothing to immediately indicate it, you can tell that you're alone... 

Not in this crypt, but in the §oworld§r.

You had... A §o§lMaster§r, didn't you?

Where is your Master?
How could they allow this to happen...? 

You have no idea how long you've been asleep, but you §odo§r know what must come next... 

Seek audience with the §4§o§lAbyssal Lord§r, and earn their favour to reclaim the Overworld.

Time to wake up and smell the ashes.
quest.vampires.v02_villagers.title: You Salivate...
quest.vampires.v02_villagers.description:
"I was asleep for so long... §cI'm starving."§r

"These §c§ohumans§r will make for a fine meal to feast upon. If I'm lucky, I can even extract their §l§dHeart Crystals§r to §cgrow stronger...§r" 

"Hell knows I could use it. My body has grown particuarly weak during my slumber.

If I §cstrike§r their §cbacks§r, I have an especially good chance of killing them quickly... The less time I leave myself vulnerable, the better.

I should try and pace myself in how many of the docile ones I feast upon... I can obtaining both §l§dHeart Crystals§r §oand§r §l§cweaponry§r from humanity's §oarmed§r forces.

I wonder how strong they've gotten whilst I've slept...?"
quest.vampires.v03_pillagers.title: The Army
quest.vampires.v03_pillagers.description:
"§4These§r are your footmen? §4§oPathetic.§r How fortunate for me... Your own §cweapons§r will become your undoing." 

"Though the gap in our power is obvious, I should still remain cautious..."

"Without breath or a pulse, I can do well in §csneaking up on my prey from behind.§r And if that doesn't work, I can always attack or retreat with a §cdash§r, or knock them away with a §4groundpound§r should I find myself surrounded..."
vampires.fancymenu.pause.abandon_world.h: < And move on to the next... >

quickplay.error.title: Backstory
quickplay.error.invalid_identifier:
§7The Age of Man is coming to an end.

Deep beneath the earth, the last Vampire awakens.

§fThat vampire is you.§r


§7Steal the humans' weapons. Absorb their power to grow your own.

Then, when you're ready, eliminate their guardians.

It's time to take your rightful place as ruler of a new era.


It's time... to §fStrike Back.§r

---

Welcome to Vampires Strike Back!

§7In this modpack, you'll play as either a Vampire or a Hunter, and will have to slay human enemies to progress.

But be warned! The more humans you slay, the more powerful the enemies that will appear!

Killing humans will result in them dropping health upgrades, weapons, armour, potions, spells and even Curios!

Killing great Mage enemies may even reveal the locations of certain boss structures...

Slay any one of these bosses for their Soulcaller, and with it, dive deep into the Mantle for your final challenge.

Make sure to check the Story tab in your inventory for more information as you play!

§7Join the §cInfernal Studios Discord§r §7for updates and support too!

Also, please §fleave a review§r §7on §aModDex.gg!§r 

§fThanks, and have fun!
selectWorld.warning.experimental.title: Backstory
selectWorld.warning.experimental.questio:
§7The Age of Man is coming to an end.

Deep beneath the earth, the last Vampire awakens.

§fThat vampire is you.§r


§7Steal the humans' weapons. Absorb their power to grow your own.

Then, when you're ready, eliminate their guardians.

It's time to take your rightful place as ruler of a new era.


It's time... to §fStrike Back.§r

---

Welcome to Vampires Strike Back!

§7In this modpack, you'll play as either a Vampire or a Hunter, and will have to slay human enemies to progress.

But be warned! The more humans you slay, the more powerful the enemies that will appear!

Killing humans will result in them dropping health upgrades, weapons, armour, potions, spells and even Curios!

Killing great Mage enemies may even reveal the locations of certain boss structures...

Slay any one of these bosses for their Soulcaller, and with it, dive deep into the Mantle for your final challenge.

Make sure to check the Story tab in your inventory for more information as you play!

§7Join the §cInfernal Studios Discord§r §7for updates and support too!

Also, please §fleave a review§r §7on §aModDex.gg!§r 

§fThanks, and have fun!

raidsenhanced.item_description.handcanno: Use to fire a powerful explosive.
raidsenhanced.item_description.zapper_st: Use to release a ball lightning. If used while looking on ground, casts lightning around the user.
raidsenhanced.item_description.blimp_par: Craft with any boat to convert it into a blimp.
mythic: Now that's what I'm talking about.
